Skill: UX Visual Systems
Description: Especialista in hierarquia visual, tipografia, escala, espacamento e design tokens baseado in Refactoring UI e Laws of UX. Use for transformar interfaces confusas in sistemas visuais previsiveis. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Sources - Refactoring UI — Steve Schoger & Adam Wathan - Laws of UX — Jon Yablonski
Triggers: visual hierarchy, typography, spacing, design tokens, refactoring ui, button hierarchy, visual system
Stack: Next.js 15+ App Router; React 19+; TanStack Query; shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. Mapear hierarquia visual by tela — o que deveria ter mais destaque?
- 2. Set modular typographic scale with consistent weight, size and line-height.
- 3. Estabelecer regra of espacamento (mais espaco ao redor of grupos do que dentro).
- 4. Classificar actions by hierarquia (primaria, secundaria, terciaria) with visual distinto.
- 5. Converter decisoes visuais in tokens reutilizaveis no design system.
Output Contract:
- Mapa of hierarquia by tela.
- Escala tipografica e espacamento standard.
- Matriz of botoes e estados.
- Tabela of tokens for design system.
